message:
test(resize_sla): add 22 edge-case tests for None applied_size, NaN/Inf latency, logging disabled, reset cycles, trait coverage (bd-1nn7a)

Edge cases: on_decision with None applied_size (early return), coalesce_ms
None fallback to time_since_render_ms, zero/negative/NaN/Inf latency values,
logging disabled produces no logs, reset-then-reuse cycle, multiple resets,
min_calibration=0 (immediately active), max_calibration=3 (small window),
last_alert tracking, forced flag propagation, applied_size propagation,
event_count accuracy, JSONL with alert entries, summary after reset,
large latency values (1e15), and trait coverage (Clone/Debug) for
SlaConfig/ResizeEvidence/SlaLogEntry/SlaSummary.

Total: 46 tests (24 existing + 22 new). All quality gates pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
